title: Lifecycle-safe entity-owned hook
prompt:
In Garry's Mod Lua, register an entity's Think-style method on a custom MyAddon.Tick hook so the callback runs, without leaving a permanent hook that keeps a removed entity alive after it is gone.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: entity/table hook identifier or paired hook.Remove
